name: Moody's KYC
description: Moodys KYC (including kompany and RDC) offers a compliance platform covering business verification, UBO discovery, sanctions, PEP and adverse media screening, with global registry data and ongoing monitoring via API.

seo.title: Moody's KYC — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Moody's KYC: Moodys KYC (including kompany and RDC) offers a compliance platform covering business verification, UBO discovery, sanctions, PEP and adverse media

when_to_use: Global KYB verification from 400M+ company records
UBO discovery and ownership structure mapping for AML
PEP and sanctions screening with RDC adverse media data
Ongoing monitoring alerts for regulatory change events
Compliance due diligence for Moody's-rated counterparty risk

pros: Kompany and RDC data give registry and screening depth
Global UBO discovery with primary-source docs
Sanctions, PEP and adverse media bundled
Moody's brand carries weight with regulators
cons: Product integration between Kompany and RDC ongoing
Overkill for early-stage or single-market fintechs
Legacy screening UIs feel dated in places
review.verdict: Enterprise KYB/KYC/AML package with regulator credibility; priced for banks, not for startups.
review.best_for: Tier-1 banks and asset managers needing audited UBO plus sanctions screening at global scale
review.not_for: Lean fintech teams that want fast self-serve onboarding without enterprise legal review cycles
